title: UpCadhoc Coverage
description: Where can I use my UpCadhoc gift cards, and what restrictions apply to online and in‑store purchases across France?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive understanding of the UpCadhoc gift voucher network: which retailers (both physical outlets and online portals) accept the card, the geographic scope of each retailer (national, regional, or local), the product categories allowed (fashion, beauty, home décor, leisure, etc.), the validity period of the voucher, and any exclusion rules (e.g., catering services, certain product lines, or specific brand restrictions). Documents that detail these acceptance lists, usage guidelines, and exclusion clauses for UpCadhoc are relevant; generic information about other gift card brands (such as Decathlon or Galeries Lafayette) is not relevant.

title: Quick Lamb Tagine
description: Find a lamb tagine recipe that can be prepared in under 30 minutes.
narrative: The user is a novice cook looking for a fast, beginner‑friendly lamb tagine recipe.  The desired result must be clearly labeled as a lamb tagine, contain a concise step‑by‑step procedure, provide a complete list of ingredients, and specify a total cooking time of 30 minutes or less.  Documents that are primarily general cooking advice or recipes for unrelated lamb preparations (e.g., lamb mice, lamb with prunes, or detailed multi‑stage sauces) are considered non‑relevant, while concise, time‑efficient lamb tagine recipes from reliable culinary sites meet relevance criteria.

title: Paris Corolla
description: I want to find the most reliable used 2018 Toyota Corolla listings in Paris within my budget, filtering out scams and enabling price comparison.
narrative: The user seeks listings that include detailed vehicle history, mileage, price, and verified seller information for a 2018 Toyota Corolla in Paris; ads lacking these details or containing generic estimates are considered irrelevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes Cooking
description: What are the best steps to make veal paupiettes at home with a simple sauce?
narrative: User wants a comprehensive guide to rolling, seasoning, frying, and baking veal paupiettes, including stuffing options, wine or broth additions, and finishing sauce techniques; relevance is defined by documents that provide detailed cooking instructions, ingredient lists, and practical tips for the dish.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What are the best ways to protect a car’s interior and occupants from UV rays, especially for babies, using sun visors or tinted film?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide that explains different types of car sun visors (roll‑up, suction‑cup, electrostatic), their installation procedures, and how they shield occupants and interior surfaces from heat and UV damage. They also want information on self‑tinted solar films, legal requirements (e.g., TLV limits on front glass), durability, and comparative benefits versus visors, with particular emphasis on protecting infants in the rear seat. Relevance means documents that cover these topics, provide practical installation tips, legal context, safety benefits, and maintenance considerations, while non‑relevant content (e.g., battery life, windscreen cleaning techniques unrelated to UV protection) should be excluded.

title: Nearest Petit Bateau Shop
description: What is the closest Petit Bateau store to me for buying baby and children’s clothing?
narrative: The user is searching for a specific store location near their current address to purchase Petit Bateau baby and children’s apparel. Relevance requires that the document provide an exact store address, phone number, operating hours, or a map link from the Petit Bateau brand’s store‑finder service, and that it does not merely describe the brand’s products or general website information.

title: Renault Staff Cars
description: I want to understand how to buy a Renault employee (collaborator) car, including discounts, warranty terms, and purchase/lease options.
narrative: The user seeks guidance on purchasing Renault collaborator vehicles, focusing on price reductions, leasing with purchase options, warranty coverage, and comparison with standard retail pricing. Relevant documents detail discounts, financing details, and conditions for staff car purchases, while non‑relevant documents reference other brands’ collaborator cars.

title: ESG in Military Education
description: How does the Graduate School of War (GSW) incorporate Environmental, Social, and Governance principles into its teaching, publishing, and e‑book distribution practices?
narrative: The user seeks to determine whether the GSW explicitly follows ESG principles and how these are reflected in its curriculum, institutional policies, and especially its e‑book publishing and delivery procedures.  Documents that refer to ESG or sustainability in the context of military education, mention environmental savings from e‑books, describe social or governance aspects of the school’s operations (e.g., data protection, licensing, procurement), or provide details about the school’s mission and publishing practices are considered relevant.  Content that lacks any reference to ESG, or that discusses unrelated subjects such as historical biographies unrelated to the school or online gaming platforms, is treated as not relevant.

title: Right of Option Decision
description: Should I exercise the right of option to update my unemployment allowance after returning to higher‑paid work?
narrative: The user is a French job seeker who has accrued unemployment benefits (ARE) and has returned to a job with higher remuneration. They want to know if they should exercise their right of option to switch from remaining old rights to a new, higher daily allowance, considering eligibility criteria such as having worked at least 130 days (910 hours) since registering, receiving a benefit that is at least 30% higher than the remaining rights, and the possibility of forfeiting the remaining old rights. This topic seeks information on the conditions, benefits, risks, and application process for the right of option as described in the relevant documents.

title: AXA Client Login Issues
description: I am having trouble logging into my AXA client area—what common problems cause login failures and how can I fix them?
narrative: The user is a policyholder who encounters login problems such as lost passwords, incorrect credentials, or account suspension. Relevant documents provide detailed troubleshooting steps: retrieving a new ID, using the ‘Forgot password’ option, verifying HTTPS and the official AXA URL, and contacting support. Irrelevant documents may mention AXA banking or broader services but lack the specific, actionable login guidance needed.

title: EV Cost & Incentives
description: What are the total costs, subsidies, and battery warranty considerations for purchasing an electric car in France, including rebates, tax exemptions, and regional aids?
narrative: The user wants a detailed explanation of how to compute the final net cost of a new or used electric vehicle in France, factoring in all available financial incentives (green bonus, conversion and retrofit premiums, second‑hand bonus, registration tax exemption), regional subsidies, and battery guarantee terms. Relevance requires documents that break down each incentive’s eligibility criteria, monetary values, and how they combine with vehicle price, lease or purchase structure, and battery warranty periods.

title: Infected Tomato Safety
description: Are tomatoes infected with downy mildew safe to eat, store, or can, and what precautions should be taken?
narrative: The user seeks reliable, science‑based guidance on the food safety of tomatoes afflicted with downy mildew, including the risk of consuming infected fruit, recommended handling and storage practices, implications for canning, and whether affected parts can be trimmed and eaten. Relevance is judged by the presence of direct evidence or expert opinion on health risks, safety guidelines, and practical advice for maintaining or discarding infected produce.

title: Monique Mathieu Prophecy
description: What reliable evidence, scientific or historical records, exist supporting Monique Mathieu’s claims of a "three‑days‑of‑darkness" event and related planetary changes, and how do these claims compare to mainstream scientific views?
narrative: The user seeks a critical, evidence‑based assessment of Monique Mathieu’s New Age prophecies, particularly the alleged three‑day darkness, planetary or pole shifts, and associated cosmic events. Relevance criteria include documents that provide verifiable data, cite peer‑reviewed research or reputable historical sources, discuss the origins and credibility of Mathieu’s claims, and offer balanced analysis contrasting the predictions with mainstream scientific explanations. The information need is nuanced, requiring sources that can confirm, refute, or contextualize the myth without treating it as unquestionable fact.

title: French Spaceballs Streaming
description: Where can I legally watch the full French‐dubbed version of Spaceballs, and how do the available streaming options compare in quality and subtitles to the original English version?
narrative: The user is seeking legitimate sources to view the 1987 Mel Brooks parody, titled *La Folle Histoire de l’Espace* in French. They want to know which official streaming or download platforms provide the full film, the resolution (HD vs standard), the existence of French subtitles or dubbing, and a comparison of these options to the original English version. Relevance is judged by documents that mention legal distribution channels (e.g., paid services, authorised VOD, IPTV) and that detail the technical and linguistic characteristics of these streams, while documents solely about torrent links, non‑legal downloads, or unrelated movie data (e.g., unrelated French historical events) are considered irrelevant. The user specifically wants reliable, vetted legal options rather than free piracy sites.

title: Artus' Evolution
description: How did Artus, as Agent Jonas Maury, evolve throughout "Le Bureau des Légendes", taking into account his background, relationships, and the influence of his comedic career?
narrative: The user is looking for a narrative of Artus’s character arc across the seasons of "Le Bureau des Légendes". The answer should draw from interviews with Artus, episode summaries, production notes, and critical reviews that discuss his development, motivations, and the realism of his portrayal.  Non‑related topics such as the escape game or unrelated cast biographies should be excluded.

title: Prevail Verb Conjugation
description: Where can I find accurate conjugation tables for the French verb "prevail", including different moods and tenses?
narrative: The user seeks a reliable reference that lists all grammatical forms of the verb "prevail" (French: "prévaillir"), covering indicative (present, past, future, conditional), subjunctive, imperative and infinitive across all persons and numbers, with example usage if possible. Relevance is judged by the presence of correct and comprehensive conjugations, appropriate formatting, and authoritative sourcing (e.g., reputable dictionaries or language learning resources).

title: Remote Celebrity Trips
description: Which episodes of Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu featured celebrities visiting remote indigenous communities, and what cultural interactions were highlighted?
narrative: The user wants a detailed list of Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu episodes that involve a known personality traveling to remote or indigenous locales, including the name of the celebrity, the destination community, and a description of the cultural exchanges or practices showcased. title: Diet for Diarrhea
description: What foods and drinks should be recommended or avoided during an episode of diarrhoea?
narrative: The user is looking for practical, evidence‑based guidance on what to eat and what to stay away from while suffering from diarrhoea. Relevant documents should discuss specific foods (soft‑cooked vegetables, lean proteins, limited fibre, low‑fat dairy, cooked fruits, rice/pureed potatoes, bananas, etc.), recommended drinks (water, electrolyte solutions, herbal teas), and foods or drinks to avoid (raw vegetables, legumes, high‑fibre fruits, dairy with lactose, fatty meats, sugary sodas, processed foods). The answer should also mention portions, timing, and hydration strategies, and should not contain general information about unrelated health topics such as eczema, depression, or potato cultivation. Non‑food‑related content (e.g., commercial product descriptions of frozen truffle potatoes, detailed botanical information about the potato plant, or advertising copy) should be considered irrelevant.

title: Espace Charenton Venue
description: I need detailed information about renting rooms at Espace Charenton for hosting a corporate event.
narrative: The user wants comprehensive venue details – total area, room capacities, number of available event spaces, booking windows, contact information, pricing structure, and any special facilities or services (e.g., catering, AV). Relevancy is limited to documents that describe Espace Charenton’s event facilities in Paris; references to the broader Charenton‑le‑Pont municipality or historical background are not pertinent.

title: Renewable Dynamic Pricing
description: Which French electricity suppliers offer 100% green electricity, dynamic hourly pricing, real‑time billing, a mobile app for consumption monitoring, and what are the subscription costs and switching procedures?
narrative: The user wants to compare suppliers such as E.Leclerc Energies, Urban Solar Energy, and ekWateur. Relevance is judged by: (1) 100% renewable electricity; (2) dynamic (hour‑by‑hour or time‑of‑use) pricing without hidden margins; (3) real‑time billing that eliminates surprise invoices; (4) a mobile app or web portal that shows hourly rates, renewable penetration, and lets the user plan consumption; (5) transparency of fees (subscription, regulatory contributions, capping options); (6) easy, non‑binding switching process and documentation about how to cancel the current contract; (7) optional features like surplus energy storage or self‑consumption. Documents that lack these criteria or focus only on non‑renewable, fixed‑rate offers are considered irrelevant.

title: Bordeaux Kia EV
description: What are the current prices, availability, and service hours for Kia electric SUVs in Bordeaux?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date information specific to the Bordeaux area: the list of available electric Kia models (such as the Niro EV or EV‑6), their MSRP or promotion pricing, the dealership’s test‑drive schedule, and after‑sales service operating hours. title: Gaulish Ancestry of Modern French
description: Which historical, archaeological and genetic evidence supports the claim that contemporary French people descend from ancient Gauls, and how does this evidence compare with other migration influences?
narrative: The user seeks scholarly, evidence‑based information to evaluate the idea that the French nation has a single ancestral line from the ancient Gauls. Relevance is judged on peer‑reviewed studies, reliable archaeological records, credible historical documents, and genetic analyses that trace population continuity or admixture. description: I want to find certified pre‑owned electric SUVs in Switzerland, from Tesla, BMW, Audi or Nissan, with mileage under 30 000 km and price below 60 000 CHF, and equipped with a panoramic roof, full‑automatic driving assist, and 2020‑or‑new model year.

narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of the compensation scheme for road accident victims, including the Badinter law, damage categories, calculation methods, and real‑life examples across different roles (pedestrian, passenger, driver). title: Office PC Selection
description: What are the best office PCs available that offer at least 16 GB RAM, 512 GB SSD, compatible with Microsoft 365, and include a €40 discount promotion?
narrative: The user is an office manager seeking a new computer for a team. title: Silver Photography History
description: What are the major historical developments and technical innovations in silver photography from its origins to its present form?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive, chronological account of silver photography, covering key inventors, chemical processes, camera technology shifts, and the transition from plates to film and beyond. Relevant documents should contain factual historical information, patent/innovation details, process descriptions, and timeline milestones such as Niépce’s heliography, the Daguerreotype, calotype, dry plates, gelatin‑silver negatives, Kodak’s film system, early colour and instant processes, and later medium‑format/small‑format developments. Non‑relevant material—blog‑style comparisons, product listings, or generic sales descriptions lacking substantive historical or technical depth—should be excluded.

description: I need a quick, low‑fat leek quiche recipe that uses Gruyère cheese but excludes any lardons or meats.

title: APRE Eligibility Process
description: How can a beneficiary of the RSA apply for and qualify for APRE assistance to cover return‑to‑work costs?
narrative: The user is a current RSA beneficiary who has just secured a new employment contract (or is about to start a training course). They need to understand the specific eligibility conditions (income thresholds, type of activity, household resources), the documentation required for the application (proof of resume of activity, budget estimates), the timing of the request (within 3 months of resumption), the variability across departments (different ceilings, allocation rules), and how the assistance can be used (mobility, training, accommodation, child care, etc.). The topic should focus on gathering all information that will allow the user to proceed with a successful APRE claim.
